Inability to prepare food, economic dependency and other psycho-social problems adversely affects the health and nutritional status of the elderly. There is a decline in immune function with advancing age, which leads to decreased resistance to infectious diseases. The increased parathyroid Senior citizens need more of vitamins and minerals to remain healthy and active 80 hormone (PTH) secretion in the elderly leads to increased bone turn over i.e. osteoporosis.
